description_long: This is a push broom with a long, straight handle made of wood or a wood-like material, attached to a wide rectangular broom head. The broom head features densely packed, straight bristles arranged in a flat, even row, ideal for sweeping large flat surfaces such as sidewalks or garage floors. The bristles are a light color, contrasting with the darker handle and the black or dark gray mounting block that secures the bristles. The handle is round in cross-section and tapers slightly toward the top, with no visible grip enhancements or end caps. The broom head is broad and flat, providing a stable sweeping surface, and the connection between the handle and head appears sturdy. There are no visible brand markings, labels, or signs of wear on any part of the broom.
description: A long-handled push broom with a wide, flat head and densely packed light-colored bristles, attached to a dark mounting block. The handle is straight, round, and made of wood or a similar material.
description_view_0: Angled side view showing the tapered wooden handle and the rectangular broom head with light bristles.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full width of the broom head and the dense, straight bristle arrangement.
description_view_2: Opposite angled side view, similar to view 0, showing the handle and the side profile of the broom head.
description_view_3: Direct rear view showing the back of the broom head and the straight alignment of the bristles.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, round wooden handle with a smooth finish and no visible grip enhancements or end caps.
attribute_bristle_arrangement: Bristles are densely packed, straight, and arranged in a single flat row across the width of the broom head, with uniform length and light coloration.
attribute_mounting_position: Designed to be stored vertically by leaning against a wall; no visible mounting hole or hook.
